name: RPlog_Narrow_Escape
title: Narrow Escape
summary: Aboard the mechanic Orson's ship, the Uwannabuyim, docked on Asteroid Kappa, the dark adept Simon Sezirok grows uneasy after a too-watchful stranger marks him in the colony. Reunited with Orson, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios, and the spacer-pilot Drew, the group must flee when the powerful Sith Lord Valak hunts them. Through a tense escape they slip away into hyperspace, and Orson reveals he secretly recorded the lightsaber confrontation with a custom device hidden in his gun. As they debate whether broadcasting the footage of standing up to Valak would help their cause or merely leave tracks back to them, the group resolves to lie low and gather strength, the hunting 'wolf' having missed them this time.
